card.name: Knowledge from Beyond
card.text: Draw three cards, then exile a card from your hand.

card.name: Contemplate
card.text: Draw a card. Muse 2. (Choose up to two counters on different permanents you control and/or cards you own in exile. For each of them, remove it or add another.)

card.name: Cloud Curtain
card.text: Flash When Cloud Curtain enters, you may return another target creature or enchantment to its owner's hand. {2}{U}, Exile Cloud Curtain: Draw a card.

card.name: Farlands Breezecaller
card.text: Prowess (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.) {5}{U}, Exile Farlands Breezecaller: Return target instant or sorcery card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Frost Manifest
card.text: Ward {2} (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {2}.) When Frost Manifest enters, if only blue and/or colorless mana was spent to cast it, tap all nonland permanents your opponents control and put a stun counter on each of those permanents.

card.name: Explosive Winter
card.text: Enchant creature When Explosive Winter enters, tap enchanted creature and all other creatures with the same name as that creature. At the beginning of your end step, put a stun counter on enchanted creature.

card.name: Spirit Wings
card.text: Enchant creature When you cast this spell, if you've cast another spell this turn, copy this spell. You may choose new targets for the copy. (The copy becomes a token.) Enchanted creature gets +1/+1 and gains flying.

card.name: Reimagine
card.text: Target creature's owner puts it on the top or bottom of their library. Muse 1. (Choose a counter on a permanent you control or a card you own in in exile. Remove it or add another.)

card.name: Plagued Thoughtbuilder
card.text: {T}: Draw a card, then exile a card from your hand. If you exiled a Nightmare card this way, muse 1. (Choose a counter on another permanent you control or a card you own in in exile. Remove it or add another.)

card.name: Imaginary Snake
card.text: Deathtouch

card.name: Runepelt Bear
card.text: Whenever Runepelt Bear deals combat damage to a player, muse 1. (Choose a counter on another permanent you control or a card you own in in exile. Remove it or add another.)

card.name: Nascent Sapling
card.text: Trample Suspend 2—{1}{G}{G} (Rather than cast this card from your hand, you may pay {1}{G}{G} and exile it with two time counters on it. At the beginning of your upkeep, remove a time counter. When the last is removed, you may cast it without paying its mana cost. It has haste.) Nascent Sapling enters with two +1/+1 counters on it if it was cast from exile.

card.name: Dreamlight Druid
card.text: When Dreamlight Druid enters, choose one — • Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. • Muse 1. (Choose a counter on another permanent you control or a card you own in in exile. Remove it or add another.)

card.name: Whisperer of the Woods
card.text: {T}: Add {G}. {T}: Add {G}{G}. Activate only if you control a creature with toughness 4 or greater.

card.name: Mossy Stoneguard
card.text: Whenever Mossy Stoneguard deals combat damage to a player, put a +1/+1 counter on it.

card.name: Lifesower Treefolk
card.text: Reach When Lifesower Treefolk enters, you gain life equal to the greatest toughness among other creatures you control. Suspend 4—{1}{G} (Rather than cast this card from your hand, you may pay {1}{G} and exile it with four time counters on it. At the beginning of your upkeep, remove a time counter. When the last is removed, you may cast it without paying its mana cost. It has haste.)

card.name: Flufftail Guide
card.text: When Flufftail Guide enters, if you own a suspended card, draw a card. Otherwise, scry 2.

card.name: Lucid Dreamwalker
card.text: {1}{G}: Muse 1. Activate only as a sorcery and only once each turn. (Choose a counter on another permanent you control or a card you own in in exile. Remove it or add another.)

card.name: Grazing Beetlebeast
card.text: Vigilance Suspend 6—{1}{G} (Rather than cast this card from your hand, you may pay {1}{G} and exile it with six time counters on it. At the beginning of your upkeep, remove a time counter. When the last is removed, you may cast it without paying its mana cost. It has haste.)

card.name: Colossal Greatwoods
card.text: Vigilance, reach When Colossal Greatwoods enters, if only green and/or colorless mana was spent to cast it, creatures you control get +2/+2 and gain vigilance until end of turn.

card.name: Arbor Strike
card.text: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. That creature deals damage equal to its toughness to target creature you don't control.

card.name: Tower Over Treetops
card.text: Target creature you control gets +X/+X until end of turn, where X is its toughness. It must be blocked this turn if able.

card.name: Inner Strength
card.text: Flash Enchant creature When Inner Strength enters, enchanted creature gains your choice of hexproof or trample until end of turn. Enchanted creature gets +2/+2.

card.name: Maker's Contemplation
card.text: Exile the top four cards of your library. Put up to one permanent card from among them into your hand. Until end of turn, you may play land cards exiled this way.

card.name: Adventurous Spirit
card.text: Enchant creature When Adventurous Spirit enters, put a +1/+1 counter on enchanted creature. Whenever enchanted creature attacks, muse 1. (Choose a counter on another permanent you control or a card you own in in exile. Remove it or add another.)

card.name: Induce Serenity
card.text: If you control a Forest and a Treefolk, you may cast this spell without paying its mana cost. Prevent all combat damage that would be dealt this turn.

card.name: Growth Mindset
card.text: Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. Muse 1. (Choose a counter on a permanent you control or a card you own in in exile. Remove it or add another.)

card.name: Return to Fantasy
card.text: Choose one — • Return to Fantasy deals 5 damage to target creature with flying. • Destroy target enchantment.

card.name: Homage to Life
card.text: Homage to Life enters tapped. {T}: Add {G}. {1}{G}, {T}, Exile Homage to Life: Draw a card.

card.name: Luminous Familiar
card.text: Lifelink Luminous Familiar enters with a +1/+1 counter on it. When Luminous Familiar dies, put its counters on another target creature you control.

card.name: Willing Cordoneer
card.text: {W}, Sacrifice Willing Cordoneer: Exile target creature or enchantment you own. For as long as it remains exiled, you may cast it without paying its mana cost.

card.name: Intrepid Hare
card.text: Suspend 2—{W} (Rather than cast this card from your hand, you may pay {W} and exile it with two time counters on it. At the beginning of your upkeep, remove a time counter. When the last is removed, you may cast it without paying its mana cost. It has haste.)

card.name: Vigil Hawkwarden
card.text: Whenever a creature you control attacks alone, untap Vigil Hawkwarden. {W}, {T}: Another target creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn. Activate only during your turn.

card.name: Dreamcatcher Mage
card.text: {2}, {T}: Tap another target untapped creature. If it's your turn and that creature has no counters on it, you may put a +1/+1 counter on it.

card.name: Students of Dreamcraft
card.text: Suspend 3—{3}{W} (Rather than cast this card from your hand, you may pay {3}{W} and exile it with three time counters on it. At the beginning of your upkeep, remove a time counter. When the last is removed, you may cast it without paying its mana cost. It has haste.) When Students of Dreamcraft enters, if you cast it from exile, put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control.

card.name: Ancestral Strix
card.text: Flying Whenever you cast a spell from exile, put a +1/+1 counter on Ancestral Strix.

card.name: Quest for Acorns
card.text: Create two 1/1 white Squirrel creature tokens with "Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, muse 1." (Choose a counter on another permanent you control or a card you own in in exile. Remove it or add another.)

card.name: Barkclad Hunter
card.text: When Barkclad Hunter enters, choose up to one— • Destroy target tapped creature. • Destroy target Nightmare creature.

card.name: Soul Searching
card.text: When Soul Searching enters, create a white Reflection enchantment creature token with "This creature's power and toughness is equal to the number of enchantments you control." {2}{W}: Scry 2.

card.name: Canopy Griff
card.text: Flying, vigilance When Canopy Griff enters, if only white and/or colorless mana was spent to cast it, distribute three +1/+1 counters among one, two, or three target creatures you control.

card.name: Venerated Chimera
card.text: When Venerated Chimera enters, create a 1/1 white Squirrel creature token with "Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, muse 1." (Choose a counter on another permanent you control or a card you own in in exile. Remove it or add another.) {2}{W}: Exile Venerated Chimera. You may cast it on a later turn without paying its mana cost.

card.name: Rend the Lucid
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast if you control an enchantment. Rend the Lucid deals 5 damage to target attacking or blocking creature.

card.name: Tragic Slumber
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature can't attack or block, and it has "{5}: Exile this creature with two time counters on it and if it doesn't have suspend, it gains suspend." (At the beginning of its controllers upkeep, they remove a time counter from it. When the last is removed, they may cast it without paying its mana cost.)

card.name: Creation's Favor
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. If you control a creature with toughness 4 or greater, you gain 1 life and you draw a card. ​

card.name: Conjure Safety
card.text: The next time a source of your choice would deal damage this turn, prevent that damage. Muse 1. (Choose a counter on a permanent you control or a card you own in in exile. Remove it or add another.)

card.name: Cloak of Reprise
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +3/+3. {0}: Exile enchanted creature. For as long as it remains exiled, its owner may cast it without paying its mana cost.

card.name: Tap into Transience
card.text: Creatures you control get +2/+1 until end of turn. Suspend 3—{1}{W} (Rather than cast this card from your hand, you may pay {1}{W} and exile it with three time counters on it. At the beginning of your upkeep, remove a time counter. When the last is removed, you may cast it without paying its mana cost.)

card.name: Shattering Declaration
card.text: Destroy target artifact or enchantment. Muse 1. (Choose a counter on a permanent you control or a card you own in in exile. Remove it or add another.)

card.name: Homage to Majesty
card.text: Homage to Majesty enters tapped. {T}: Add {W}. {1}{W}, {T}, Exile Homage to Majesty: Draw a card.

card.name: Reflection WBR
card.text: This token's power and toughness are each equal to the number of enchantments you control.

card.name: Squirrel WBR
card.text: Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, muse 1. (Choose a counter on another permanent you control or a card you own in in exile. Remove it or add another.)

card.name: Rebloom Apex
card.text: At the beginning of your second main phase, add one mana of any color. {2}, Exile Rebloom Apex: Muse 2. (Choose up to two counters on different other permanents you control and/or cards you own in exile. For each of them, remove it or add another.)

card.name: Grim Stalker
card.text: Haste Unnerve — Whenever one or more cards you own are put into exile, Grim Stalker gets +1/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Inaugural Migration
card.text: Create two 1/1 red Beast creature tokens. If you control no tapped lands, instead create three 1/1 red Beast creature tokens and they gain haste until end of turn. Suspend 1—{2}{R}{R} (Rather than cast this card from your hand, you may pay {2}{R}{R} and exile it with a time counter on it. At the beginning of your upkeep, remove a time counter. When the last is removed, you may cast it without paying its mana cost.)

card.name: Readied Blademaster
card.text: Whenever you cast your second spell each turn, Readied Blademaster gets +1/+0 and gains first strike until end of turn.

card.name: Terrorized Terrorizer
card.text: {4}{R}, Exile Terrorized Terrorizer from your graveyard: Create a tapped 0/0 black Nightmare creature token and put three +1/+1 counters on it. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Growing Following
card.text: When Growing Following enters, you may search your library for a card named Growing Following and exile it with three time counters on it. Suspend 3—{R} (Rather than cast this card from your hand, you may pay {R} and exile it with three time counters on it. At the beginning of your upkeep, remove a time counter. When the last is removed, you may cast it without paying its mana cost. It has haste.)

card.name: Dreamdust Sage
card.text: When Dreamdust Sage enters, choose one— • Destroy target colorless nonland permanent. • Add {R} for each suspended card you own.

card.name: Ire Razer
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, exile a creature you control or a card from your hand. Menace

card.name: Orcish Javelineer
card.text: Orcish Javelineer enters with a javelin counter on it. Orcish Javelineer has reach as long as it has a javelin counter on it. Whenever Orcish Javelineer becomes blocked, you may remove a javelin counter from it. If you do, Orcish Javelineer deals 3 damage to target creature blocking it.

card.name: Aberrant Ogre
card.text: Trample Aberrant Ogre enters with a +1/+1 counter on it if you own a suspended card.

card.name: Imminent Storm
card.text: Imminent Storm deals 3 damage to any target. Suspend 2—{R} (Rather than cast this card from your hand, you may pay {R} and exile it with two time counters on it. At the beginning of your upkeep, remove a time counter. When the last is removed, you may cast it without paying its mana cost.)

card.name: Incanted Bombardment
card.text: This spell costs {2} less to cast if you've cast another spell this turn. Incanted Bombardment deals 5 damage to target creature or planeswalker.

card.name: Panicked State
card.text: Gain control of target creature until end of turn. Untap that creature. Until end of turn, it gets +1/+0 for each Nightmare you control.

card.name: Take the Offensive
card.text: Creatures you control get +2/+0 until end of turn. If you own three or more cards in exile, draw a card.

card.name: Novel Divining
card.text: Exile the top two cards of your library. Until the end of your next turn, you may play those cards. If any of those cards have suspend, until the end of your next turn, you may suspend them. (You still pay the suspend costs.)

card.name: Furcated Fury
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +1/+1 and has menace. Unnerve — Whenever one or more cards you own are put into exile from anywhere, until end of turn, enchanted creature can't be blocked except by three or more creatures.

card.name: Surge of Glory
card.text: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. That creature gains first strike until end of turn.

card.name: Hazardous Blast
card.text: Hazardous Blast deals 1 damage to each creature your opponents control. Creatures your opponents control can't block this turn.

card.name: Wall of Roses
card.text: Defender, reach {T}: Wall of Roses deals 1 damage to each opponent. Whenever you cast a spell from exile, untap Wall of Roses.

card.name: Homage to Indulgence
card.text: Homage to Indulgence enters tapped. {T}: Add {R}. {1}{R}, {T}, Exile Homage to Indulgence: Draw a card.

card.name: Flying Mantis
card.text: Flying {2}{U}, Exile Flying Mantis from your graveyard: Put a flying counter on target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Starlight Navigator
card.text: Vigilance {T}: Add {U}. Spend this mana only to cast enchantment spells or activate an ability of an enchantment source.

card.name: Star Seeker
card.text: When Star Seeker enters, draw a card. If you've cast two or more spells this turn, instead scry 2 then draw a card.

card.name: Canine Accomplice
card.text: The second spell you cast each turn costs {2} less to cast.

card.name: Parasomnia
card.text: Create a 0/0 black Nightmare creature token. Put X +1/+1 counters on it, where X is one plus the number of cards you own in exile.

card.name: Starbog Bullfrog
card.text: Suspend 5—{1}{U} (Rather than cast this card from your hand, you may pay {1}{U} and exile it with five time counters on it. At the beginning of your upkeep, remove a time counter. When the last is removed, you may cast it without paying its mana cost. It has haste.) When Starbog Bullfrog enters, you may return another target creature to its owner's hand.

card.name: Warped Reflection
card.text: Defender Unnerve — If a card you own was exiled from anywhere this turn, Warped Reflection can attack as though it didn't have defender.

card.name: Star Capture
card.text: Counter target spell. If you countered an enchantment spell this way, create a Treasure token.

card.name: Accumulating Flaws
card.text: Counter target spell unless its controller pays {2}, plus an additional {1} for each card you own in exile.

card.name: Negate
card.text: Counter target noncreature spell.

card.name: Decorated Starshell
card.text: Whenever one or more counters are put on an enchantment you control, creatures you control get +1/+1 until end of turn. If an enchantment you control would leave the battlefield, exile it instead and add {U}.

card.name: Eternity Watcher
card.text: Flying Unnerve — Whenever one or more cards you own are put into exile from anywhere, you may pay 2 life. If you do, draw a card.

card.name: Thought Ravager
card.text: Unnerve — At the beginning of your end step, if one or more cards you own were put into exile this turn, each opponent may discard a card or sacrifice a permanent of their choice. Thought Ravager deals 3 damage to each opponent who didn't.

card.name: Cultivator of Bounty
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, you may move a counter from a permanent you control or a card you own in exile onto Cultivator of Bounty. Whenever Cultivator attacks, you may remove up to three counters from it. If you do, creatures you control get +1/+1 until end of turn for each counter removed this way.

card.name: Herald of Glory
card.text: Lifelink Spells you cast and abilities you activate that target Herald of Glory cost {1} less cast or activate.

card.name: Hellion Catalyzer
card.text: When Hellion Catalyzer enters, create a 1/1 red Hellion creature token and scry 1. Whenever you cast your second spell each turn, return up to one target enchantment you control to its owner's hand.

card.name: Ancient Lumberknot
card.text: Each creature you control with toughness greater than its power assigns combat damage equal to its toughness rather than its power.

card.name: Timescape Tactician
card.text: Suspend 2—{1}{R}{W} (Rather than cast this card from your hand, you may pay {1}{R}{W} and exile it with two time counters on it. At the beginning of your upkeep, remove a time counter. When the last is removed, you may cast it without paying its mana cost. It has haste.) Whenever Timescape Tactician enters from exile or you cast a spell from exile, target creature gets +2/+0 and gains lifelink until end of turn.

card.name: Keeper of Legacy
card.text: Keeper of Legacy enters with a +1/+1 counter on it. Whenever a counter is removed from Keeper of Legacy, you gain 3 life and draw a card.

card.name: Unwilling Ingredient
card.text: Menace (This creature can't be blocked except by two or more creatures.) {2}{B}, Exile Unwilling Ingredient from your graveyard: You draw a card and you lose 1 life.

card.name: Feardrinker
card.text: Unnerve — Whenever one or more cards you own are exiled, Feardrinker gets +1/+1 and gains lifelink until end of turn.

card.name: Reaping Gorgon
card.text: Deathtouch Reaping Gorgon gets +2/+2 as long as you own seven or more cards in exile.

card.name: Dreadfeeder Vulture
card.text: Flying Exile five cards from your graveyard: Each opponent loses 2 life and you gain 2 life.

card.name: Trauma Seeder
card.text: Unnerve — Whenever one or more cards you own are exiled, each opponent loses 1 life.

card.name: Dreamrobber Boggart
card.text: When Dreamrobber Boggart enters, you may exile a creature card from your graveyard. If you do, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control.

card.name: Festering Wildroach
card.text: Menace When Festering Wildroach enters or dies, muse 1. (Choose a counter on another permanent you control or a card you own in in exile. Remove it or add another.)

card.name: Malevolent Imperial
card.text: {1}{B}, Exile another creature you control: Put a +1/+1 counter on Malevolent Imperial.

card.name: Stubborn Lumberkin
card.text: Menace When Stubborn Lumberkin enters, if only black and/or colorless mana was spent to cast it, target creature gets -4/-4 until end of turn.

card.name: Deathsower Treefolk
card.text: Reach When Deathsower Treefolk enters, each opponent loses life equal to the greatest toughness among other creatures you control. Suspend 4—{2}{B} (Rather than cast this card from your hand, you may pay {2}{B} and exile it with four time counters on it. At the beginning of your upkeep, remove a time counter. When the last is removed, you may cast it without paying its mana cost. It has haste.)

card.name: Jarred Awake
card.text: Destroy target creature or planeswalker. You may put a +1/+1 counter on a creature you control or put a time counter on a suspended card in exile.

card.name: Dead Weight
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets -2/-2.

card.name: Nightmarish Culling
card.text: Choose one— • Each opponent sacrifices a creature. • Each opponent sacrifices an enchantment. • Each opponent puts a suspended card they own from exile into their graveyard.

card.name: Demuse
card.text: As an additional cost to cast, exile a creature you control or pay {3}{B}. Destroy target creature.

card.name: Delusions of Power
card.text: You draw two cards and lose 2 life. Suspend 2—{1}{B} (Rather than cast this card from your hand, you may pay {1}{B} and exile it with two time counters on it. At the beginning of your upkeep, remove a time counter. When the last is removed, you may cast it without paying its mana cost.)

card.name: Raise Dread
card.text: Return up to two target creature cards from your graveyard to your hand Suspend 3—{B} (Rather than cast this card from your hand, you may pay {B} and exile it with three time counters on it. At the beginning of your upkeep, remove a time counter. When the last is removed, you may cast it without paying its mana cost.)

card.name: Obliviate Identity
card.text: Target opponent discards a card. Unnerve — If a card you own was exiled from anywhere this turn, instead that player reveals their hand, you choose a nonland card from it, then that player discards that card.

card.name: Nightmarish Vigor
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +2/+0. When enchanted creature dies or is put into exile from the battlefield, return it to the battlefield under its owner's control.

card.name: Subtle Strike
card.text: Choose one or both— • Target creature gets -1/-1 until end of turn. • Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature.

card.name: Homage to Mystery
Gnarled Spawn
card.text: Defender When Gnarled Spawn dies, choose one— • Target creature gets -1/-1 until end of turn. • Muse 1. (Choose a counter on another permanent you control or a card you own in in exile. Remove it or add another.)

card.name: Nightveil Pathmaker
card.text: Menace Whenever Nightveil Pathmaker attacks alone, put a +1/+1 counter on it. {B}, Exile Nightveil Pathmaker from your graveyard: Put two time counters on up to one target suspended card.

card.name: Winding Recluse
card.text: Deathtouch Whenever Winding Recluse attacks, you may exile a card from your hand or graveyard. Whenever Winding Recluse deals combat damage to a player, that player loses X life, where X is the number of cards you own in exile.

card.name: Tainted Simian
card.text: Whenever Tainted Simian attacks alone, it gets +1/+0 and gains menace until end of turn. Spells you cast and abilities you activate that target Tainted Simian cost {1} less and 2 additional life more to cast or activate.

card.name: Rustbark Shell
Scourge of Knottridge
card.text: When Scourge of Knottridge enters, up to one target creature gets -X/-X until end of turn, where X is the greatest toughness among other creatures you control.

card.name: Cobaash, the Boggart Prince
card.text: Exalted (Whenever a creature you control attacks alone, that creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.) Whenever a creature you control that's attacking alone dies, you draw a card and you lose 1 life.

card.name: Grasp of the Nightking
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) Destroy target creature. You may exile a creature you control. If you do, draw a card. Exile Grasp of the Nightking and up to three target cards from graveyards.

card.name: Rakish Revival
card.text: Return target creature card from a graveyard to the battlefield under your control with a +1/+1 counter on it. It can't attack for as long as it has a +1/+1 counter on it.

card.name: Impending End
card.text: Each opponent sacrifices a creature with the greatest power among creatures they control. Suspend 2—{2}{B} (Rather than cast this card from your hand, you may pay {2}{B} and exile it with two time counters on it. At the beginning of your upkeep, remove a time counter. When the last is removed, you may cast it without paying its mana cost.)

card.name: Unnerving Mutation
card.text: Target player exiles cards from the top of their library until they exile a land card. Then, each opponent loses life equal to the number of cards exiled this turn or the number of Nightmares you control, whichever is greater.

card.name: Spiteful Countenance
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature has "Exile another creature you control: Put a +1/+1 counter on this creature." When enchanted creature leaves the battlefield, each opponent loses X life and you gain X life where X is its toughness.

card.name: Nightmarish Tutor
card.text: Search your library for a card, put that card into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Bright-Eyed Scout
card.text: Bright-Eyed Scout can't be blocked by creatures with power 3 or greater. Whenever Bright-Eyed Scout deals combat damage to a player, muse 1. (Choose a counter on another permanent you control or a card you own in in exile. Remove it or add another.)

card.name: Abstract Arbor
card.text: Vigilance When Abstract Arbor enters or dies, if you control a creature with toughness 4 or greater, draw a card.

card.name: Friendly Fir
card.text: Friendly Fir enters with two +1/+1 counters on it. When Friendly Fir enters, create a 1/1 white Squirrel creature token with "When this creature deals combat damage to a player, muse 1." (Choose a counter on another permanent you control or a card you own in in exile. Remove it or add another.)

card.name: Parading Bouquet
card.text: Reach Parading Bouquet enters with a +1/+1 counter on it. {G}, {T}, Remove a +1/+1 counter from Parading Bouquet: Destroy target artifact or enchantment.

card.name: Rockbreaker Rhino
card.text: When Rockbreaker Rhino enters, you may have target creature assign its combat damage this turn as though it weren't blocked. Suspend 2—{3}{G} (Rather than cast this card from your hand, you may pay {3}{G} and exile it with two time counters on it. At the beginning of your upkeep, remove a time counter. When the last is removed, you may cast it without paying its mana cost. It has haste.)

card.name: Ramhead Crasher
card.text: When Ramhead Crasher enters, it fights up to one target creature you don't control. Suspend 3—{1}{R}{R} (Rather than cast this card from your hand, you may pay {1}{R}{R} and exile it with three time counters on it. At the beginning of your upkeep, remove a time counter. When the last is removed, you may cast it without paying its mana cost. It has haste.)

card.name: Bloomweft Behemoth
card.text: Other creatures you control enter with an additional +1/+1 counter on them. Bloomweft Behemoth gets +1/+1 for each other creature you control with a counter on it.

card.name: Chronognawer
card.text: Whenever a time counter is removed from a card you own in exile, creatures you control gain trample until end of turn. Whenever Chronognawer deals combat damage to a player, muse 1. (Choose a counter on another permanent you control or a card you own in in exile. Remove it or add another.)

card.name: Bushwhack
card.text: Choose one — • Search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand then shuffle. • Target creature you control fights target creature you don't control.

card.name: Awakening of Bramblebark
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) Scry 3. Reveal the top card of your library. If a land card is revealed this way, put it onto the battlefield tapped. Put four +1/+1 counters on target land you control and it becomes a 0/0 Treefolk creature with haste. It's still a land.

card.name: Strength From the Heart
card.text: Distribute four +1/+1 counters among up to four target creatures you control. Suspend 4—{G} (Rather than cast this card from your hand, you may pay {G} and exile it with four time counters on it. At the beginning of your upkeep, remove a time counter. When the last is removed, you may cast it without paying its mana cost.)

card.name: Poisoned Dogma
card.text: At the beginning of combat on your turn, exile the top card of your library. When you do, if you own four or more cards in exile, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control and it gains deathtouch until end of turn.

card.name: Rebloom
card.text: Exile target nonland card with mana value X plus 2 or less from your graveyard with two time counters on it. If it doesn't have suspend, it gains suspend. (At the beginning of your upkeep, remove a time counter. When the last is removed, you may cast it without paying its mana cost. If it's a creature, it has haste.)

card.name: Fathom Encroacher
card.text: When Fathom Encroacher attacks, exile the top card of your library. If it's a noncreature card, Fathom Encroacher can't be blocked this turn.

card.name: Minstrel of Bemusement
card.text: Minstrel of Bemusement enters with a +1/+1 counter on it. Whenever an enchantment you control enters, muse 1. (Choose a counter on another permanent you control or a card you own in in exile. Remove it or add another.)

card.name: Heretical Devotee
card.text: Unnerve — Whenever one or more cards you own are put into exile, put a foreshadow counter on Heretical Devotee. Remove eight foreshadow counters from Heretical Devotee: Create a 0/0 black Nightmare creature token. Put eight +1/+1 counters on it.

card.name: Aeon Drifter
card.text: Flying Whenever Aeon Drifter blocks a creature, you may exile Aeon Drifter and put a time counter on it. Suspend 2—{2}{U} (Rather than cast this card from your hand, you may pay {2}{U} and exile it with two time counters on it. At the beginning of your upkeep, remove a time counter. When the last is removed, you may cast it without paying its mana cost. It has haste.)

card.name: Lake Monstrosity
card.text: When Lake Monstrosity enters, exile target nonland permanent you don't control with three time counters on it. If it doesn't have suspend, it gains suspend. Lake Monstrosity can't be blocked as long as defending player owns a suspended card.

card.name: Lost Dreamseeker
card.text: This spell costs {2} less as long as you've cast another spell this turn. When Lost Dreamseeker enters, return target instant or sorcery card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Inner Self
card.text: Create a token that's a copy of a creature you control, except it's an enchantment and Reflection in addition to its other types.

card.name: Stolen Knowledge
card.text: Exile the top four cards of your library. You may put a card exiled this way into your hand. Suspend 2—{1}{B} (Rather than cast this card from your hand, you may pay {1}{B} and exile it with two time counters on it. At the beginning of your upkeep, remove a time counter. When the last is removed, you may cast it without paying its mana cost.)

card.name: Snap Awake
card.text: Counter target spell. Unnerve — Untap up to one permanent you control. If a card you own was put into exile this turn, untap up to two permanents you control instead.

card.name: Learn Through Repetition
card.text: Choose one— • When you next cast an instant or sorcery spell this turn, copy that spell. You may choose new targets for the copy. • The next sorcery spell you cast this turn can be cast as though it had flash.

card.name: Dreamwoven Arcana
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) Draw three cards, then put two cards from your hand on top of your library in any order. Scry 2. Exile the top card of your library. If its a nonland card with mana value 2 or less, you may cast it without paying its mana cost.

card.name: Haze of Lucidity
card.text: Tap all creatures target player controls. Muse 1. (Choose a counter on a permanent you control or a card you own in in exile. Remove it or add another.) Flashback {4}{U}{U} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: Living Inquiry
card.text: Flying Whenever you cast your second spell each turn, put a +1/+1 counter on Living Inquiry. {2}{U}: Living Inquiry becomes a 2/2 Sphinx creature in addition to its other types until end of turn.

card.name: Angel of Guiding Light
card.text: Flying, vigilance Suspend 3—{1}{W}{W} (Rather than cast this card from your hand, you may pay {1}{W}{W} and exile it with three time counters on it. At the beginning of your upkeep, remove a time counter. When the last is removed, you may cast it without paying its mana cost. It has haste.)

card.name: Blank
card.text: Kicker {3} (You may pay an additional {3} as you cast this spell.) Exile target nonland permanent if it's tapped, if it's an artifact or enchantment, or if this spell was kicked.

card.name: Farwalker Herd
card.text: Whenever a time counter is removed from Farwalker Herd while it's exiled, you may search your library for a basic Plains card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. Suspend 1—{2}{W} (Rather than cast this card from your hand, you may pay {2}{W} and exile it with a time counter on it. At the beginning of your upkeep, remove a time counter. When the last is removed, you may cast it without paying its mana cost. It has haste.)

card.name: Loyal Realmguard
card.text: Whenever a time counter is removed from a card you own in exile, put a +1/+1 counter on Loyal Realmguard.

card.name: Breathe Life
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) Put your choice of a +1/+1 counter, a vigilance counter, or a lifelink counter on target artifact or enchantment you control. Until end of turn, target noncreature artifact or enchantment you control becomes a creature in addition to its other types. Its base power and toughness are each equal to the number of lore counters on Breathe Life. ​

card.name: Wooly Hermit
card.text: Flash When Wooly Hermit enters, exile another target nonland permanent. For as long as that card remains exiled, its owner may cast it without paying its mana cost. Suspend 2—{1}{U} (Rather than cast this card from your hand, you may pay {1}{U} and exile it with two time counters on it. At the beginning of your upkeep, remove a time counter. When the last is removed, you may cast it without paying its mana cost. It has haste.)

card.name: Mirror Trap
card.text: When Mirror Trap enters, exile target nonland permanent until Mirror Trap leaves the battlefield. When Mirror Trap enters, create a white Reflection enchantment creature token with "This creature's power and toughness are each equal to the number of enchantments you control."

card.name: Chittering Burrower
card.text: Whenever Chittering Burrower deals combat damage to a player, muse 1. (Choose a counter on another permanent you control or a card you own in in exile. Remove it or add another.) Whenever Chittering Burrower is put into exile from anywhere, create a 1/1 white Squirrel creature token with "Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, muse 1."

card.name: Dauntless Banneret
card.text: Dauntless Banneret enters with a +1/+1 counter on it. At the beginning of combat on your turn, if you control no tapped lands, Dauntless Banneret gains double strike until end of turn.

card.name: Runaround Entangler
card.text: Whenever you cast a spell from exile, tap target creature you don't control.

card.name: Uplift
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +1/+1 and has flying. When Uplift is put into a graveyard from the battlefield, you may exile it. If you do, return target enchantment card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Light Overwhelming
card.text: Exile the top five cards of your library, then choose any number of nonland permanent cards with total mana value 5 or less from among cards exiled this way, cards in your graveyard, and cards on the battlefield. Destroy each card chosen this way that's on the battlefield and put the rest into their owners' hands.

card.name: Branchwefting
card.text: Whenever Branchwefting or another nontoken enchantment enters under your control, create a 1/1 white Squirrel creature token with "Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, muse 1." (Choose a counter on another permanent you control or a card you own in in exile. Remove it or add another.)

card.name: Incautious Benefactor
card.text: Menace If you would put two or more time counters on a card you own in exile, put that many minus one on that card instead.

card.name: Fellowful Artisan
Crazed Curator
card.text: Whenever Crazed Curator enters or attacks, you may put a suspended card you own from exile into your graveyard. If you do, put a +1/+1 counter on Crazed Curator and draw a card. Crazed Curator can't block as long as it has a +1/+1 counter on it.

card.name: Brimskin Surlicant
card.text: Prowess (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.) Unnerve — At the beginning of your end step, if a card you own was put into exile this turn, exile the top card of your library. You may play that card until the end of your next turn.

card.name: Blazingplate Monitor
Splinterhorn Pugilist
card.text: Whenever you cast a spell from anywhere other than your hand, Splinterhorn Pugilist gains trample and haste until end of turn. Scry 1.

card.name: Voltaic Manifestation
card.text: Unnerve — Whenever a card you own is put into exile, until end of turn, Voltaic Manifestation becomes a 5/5 Dragon Elemental creature in addition to its other types, and it gains flying, trample, and haste.

card.name: Static Strangle
card.text: Static Strangle deals 4 damage to target creature. Exile Static Strangle.

card.name: Unfathomable Stoke
card.text: Damage can't be prevented this turn. Unfathomable Stoke deals X damage to target creature and 1 damage to each other creature with the same controller.

card.name: Incredulous Revelation
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, discard a card. Draw two cards. If you've cast another spell this turn, draw three cards instead.

card.name: Blaze of the Tyrant
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) You may exile a card from your hand. If you do, draw two cards. When you next cast an instant or sorcery spell this turn, copy that spell. You may choose new targets for the copy. Exile target instant or sorcery card from your graveyard and put two time counters on it. If it doesn't have suspend, it gains suspend.

card.name: Dreamers' Determination
card.text: If a creature you control would deal damage to an opponent or a permanent an opponent controls, it deals that much damage plus 1 instead. Whenever you cast your second spell each turn, creatures you control gain trample until end of turn.

card.name: Rise and Raze
card.text: Choose one. If this spell was cast from exile, you may choose both instead— • Target creature you control gets +2/+0 until end of turn. It deals damage equal to its power to target creature you don't control. • Destroy target colorless nonland permanent or nonbasic land. Suspend 1— {3}{R}{R}

card.name: Dreamwoven Druid
card.text: Dreamwoven Druid enters with two +1/+1 counters on it. If you spent three mana of the same color to cast it, it enters with three +1/+1 counters instead.

card.name: Dream Servant
card.text: Sacrifice Dream Servant: Put target suspend card from exile into its owner's graveyard. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Hueheft Giant
card.text: This spell costs {X} less to cast, where X is the greatest number of permanents you control that each share a color.

card.name: Nightsnare
card.text: When Nightsnare enters, exile target creature. {4}, Sacrifice Nightsnare: Create a 0/0 black Nightmare creature token. Put X +1/+1 counters on it, where X is the exiled card's power.

card.name: Nostalgic Vista
card.text: As Nostalgic Vista enters, choose a color. Nostalgic Vista enters tapped unless you control three or more permanents of the chosen color. {T}: Add one mana of the chosen color. {4}, {T}, Exile Nostalgic Vista: Return target card of the chosen color from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Horizon Elemental
card.text: Haste Horizon Elemental gets +1/+1 for each time counter among suspended cards you own.

card.name: Coalwing Snapper
card.text: Flying When Coalwing Snapper enters, if only red and/or colorless mana was spent to cast it, exile up to one target instant or sorcery card from your graveyard. If you do, copy it. You may cast the copy without paying its mana cost.

card.name: Abscond Fate
card.text: If your life total is 0 or less, it becomes 1. You can't lose the game this turn and your opponents can't win the game this turn. You get X shield counters. (If you would be dealt damage or lose the game, you lose a shield counter instead.)

card.name: Behold Creation
card.text: For each enchantment you control, create a token that's a copy of that permanent.

card.name: Paranoia Clutcher
card.text: Menace Whenever Paranoia Clutcher attacks, exile up to one target card from a graveyard. For as long as it remains exiled, you may cast it. Whenever Paranoia Clutcher deals combat damage to a player, at the beginning of your next main phase, you lose that much life and add that much mana in any combination of colors.

card.name: Plunge into Eternity
card.text: Exile cards from the top of your library until you have exiled cards with total mana value X or more. For each nonland card exiled this way, put two time counters on it, then if it doesn't have suspend, it gains suspend.

card.name: Bramblebark, Worldweaver
card.text: [+2]: Create a 0/1 green Treefolk creature token, then put a +1/+1 counter on it. [+1]: Muse 2. (Choose up to two counters on different other permanents you control and/or cards you own in exile. For each of them, remove it or add another.) [-4]: Draw a card for each permanent you control and card you own in exile with one or more counters on it. [-12]: Search your library for up to seven nonland permanent cards and exile each of them with a time counter on it. Each of those cards that doesn't have suspend gains suspend.

card.name: The Dewfather
card.text: Suspend 9—{1}{G} Whenever a time counter is removed from The Dewfather while it's exiled, you gain 1 life. If The Dewfather has five, four, or three time counters on it (after removing the time counter), instead a creature you control gets +1/+1 until end of turn. If The Dewfather has two or one time counters on it, instead create a 2/2 green Bear creature token. If that was the last time counter on The Dewfather, instead distribute ten +1/+1 counters among creatures you control.

card.name: Orthuz, the Dreamcleaver
card.text: Unnerve — Whenever one or more cards you own are put into exile, put two loyalty counters on Orthuz, the Dreamcleaver. [-X]: Search your library for a Nightmare or Aura card with mana value X, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle. [-8]: Whenever a creature you control attacks alone this turn, destroy all other creatures.

card.name: Kulos, Bard of The Skids
card.text: [+1]: Create a 1/1 red and blue Faerie creature token with flying, haste, and "Whenever this token deals combat damage to an opponent, sacrifice it, draw a card, then discard a card." [-2]: When you cast your second spell this turn, copy it and you may choose new targets for the copy. [-6]: Until end of turn, whenever you cast a spell, draw two cards and add four mana of any one color.

card.name: Wrathwood Hellkite
card.text: Flying When Wrathwood Hellkite dies, create a 1/2 red and green Dragon Saproling creature token with flying. Regrow 3 (When this creature dies, exile it with three time counters on it. It gains suspend. Creatures cast from suspend have haste.)

card.name: HAL, Impartial Observer
card.text: Whenever you cast a spell from exile, create a 1/1 colorless Construct artifact creature token. [+1]: Add {R}{R}. Spend this mana only to pay suspend costs or activate abilities. [-X]: Look at the top X cards of your library. Exile one of them and put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order. Put a number of time counters on the exiled cards equal to its mana value. If it doesn't have suspend, it gains suspend.

card.name: Frosthollow Owl
card.text: Flying, vigilance, lifelink Frosthollow Owl enters with a +1/+1 counter on it.

card.name: Emanation of Angels
card.text: Suspend 3—{4}{W}{W} (Rather than cast this card from your hand, pay {4}{W}{W} and exile it with three time counters on it. At the beginning of your upkeep, remove a time counter. When the last is removed, you may cast it without paying its mana cost.) Whenever a time counter is removed from Emanation of Angels while it's exiled, create a 4/4 white Angel creature token with flying.

card.name: Recollection of Virtue
card.text: Tiered (Choose one additional cost.) + {1}{W} — Destroy target artifact or enchantment. + {2}{W} — Destroy target creature with toughness 4 or greater. + {4}{W}{W} — Destroy all artifacts, creatures, and enchantments.

card.name: Dreamspeak Augur
card.text: Whenever you cast your second spell each turn, create a blue Aura enchantment token attached to a creature you control. The token has enchant creature and "Enchanted creature gets +1/+1 and has ward {1}." Then, scry X, where X is the number of enchantments you control.

card.name: The Masked
card.text: Unnerve — Whenever one or more cards you own put into exile from anywhere, if any of those cards are creature cards, you may have The Masked become a copy of one of those creature cards until end of turn.

card.name: Ambitious Vision
card.text: When Ambitious Vision enters, put a thought counter on a land you control. Whenever you draw a card, muse 1. (Choose a counter on another permanent you control or a card you own in in exile. Remove it or add another.) At the beginning of your upkeep, if a permanent you control has twenty or more thought counters on it, you win the game.

card.name: Limitless Creativity
card.text: Search your library for up to three instant and or sorcery cards with different names, exile them, then shuffle. You may cast those cards for as long as they remain exiled.

card.name: Recollection of Aptitude
card.text: Tiered (Choose one additional cost.) + {U} — Scry 1, then draw a card. + {2}{U} — Draw two cards. + {3}{U}{U} — Each player shuffles their hand and graveyard into their library, then draws seven cards.

card.name: Direrot, Poisoned Oak
card.text: Deathtouch Whenever a Treefolk you control deals combat damage to a player, that player gets that many poison counters. (A player with ten or more poison counters loses the game.)

card.name: Reculmination of Orthuz
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) Choose a card from a graveyard or the top card of a player's library. Exile it. For as long as it remains exiled, you may cast it by paying 2 life in addition to its other costs and mana of any type can be spent to do so. You may put a creature card exiled with this Saga or from your graveyard onto the battlefield under your control. ​

card.name: Emanation of Torments
card.text: Suspend X—{X}{B}{B}. X can't be 0. (Rather than cast this card from your hand, pay {X}{B}{B} and exile it with two time counters on it. At the beginning of your upkeep, remove a time counter. When the last is removed, you may cast it without paying its mana cost.) Whenever a time counter is removed from Emanation of Torments while it's exiled, each opponent loses 3 life unless that player sacrifices a nonland permanent or discards a card.

card.name: Recollection of Ambition
card.text: Tiered (Choose one additional cost.) + {B} — Target opponent reveals their hand. You choose a noncreature, nonland card from it. That player discards that card. + {1}{B}{B} — Destroy target creature or planeswalker. + {4}{B} — Return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Habrim, the Redeemer
card.text: Flying Whenever another nontoken creature enters, if it was cast from its owner's hand, you may exile it with a time counter on it. If it doesn't have suspend, it gains suspend. Creatures you control entering the battlefield from exile or cast from exile enter with an additional +1/+1 counter on them.

card.name: Durged, Troubled Dreamer
card.text: Ward—Pay 3 life. (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays 3 life.) Whenever an effect you control puts two or more counters on a permanent, player, or card in exile, create a 3/1 red Nightmare creature token with "This creature attacks each turn if able."

card.name: Lightning Blade Paladin
card.text: Lightning Blade Paladin has first strike as long as its your turn. Whenever you cast your second spell each turn, you may have Lightning Blade Paladin deal 3 damage to any target.

card.name: Firemane Feline
card.text: Trample Unnerve — Whenever one or more cards you own are put into exile from anywhere, exile the top card of your library. Firemane Feline gets +X/+0 until end of turn, where X is the exiled card's mana value. This ability triggers only once each turn. Whenever Firemane Feline attacks, until end of turn, you may play cards exiled with it.

card.name: Emanation of Ire
card.text: Suspend 2—{2}{R}{R} (Rather than cast this card from your hand, pay {2}{R}{R} and exile it with two time counters on it. At the beginning of your upkeep, remove a time counter. When the last is removed, you may cast it without paying its mana cost.) Whenever a time counter is removed from Emanation of Ire while it's exiled, if a source you control would deal damage this turn, it deals double that damage instead.

card.name: Recollection of Passion
card.text: Tiered (Choose one additional cost.) + {R} — Recollection of Passion deals 3 damage to any target. + {2}{R} — Gain control of target creature until end of turn. Untap that creature. It gains haste until end of turn. + {2}{R}{R} — Untap all creatures that attacked this turn. After this main phase, there is an additional combat phase followed by an additional main phase.

card.name: Galetop Greatwurm
card.text: Trample, reach Suspend 2—{G} (Rather than cast this card from your hand, you may pay {G} and exile it with two time counters on it. At the beginning of your upkeep, remove a time counter. When the last is removed, you may cast it without paying its mana cost. It has haste.) If you would cast Galetop Greatwurm without paying its mana cost, it's a sorcery named Prey Upon with "Target creature you control fights target creature you don't control." (Instead of a creature.)

card.name: Shrubpelt Bane
card.text: Shrubpelt Bane can't be countered. Trample Protection from everything not on the battlefield. (This creature can't be blocked, targeted, dealt damage, enchanted, or equipped by anything not on the battlefield.)

card.name: Blessing of the Realm
card.text: Enchant land Other nontoken permanents you control have all activated abilities of enchanted land in addition to their other abilities. Each of those permanents that's a land also has all land types of enchanted land in addition to its other types.

card.name: Emanation of Evolution
card.text: Suspend 3—{1}{G}{G} (Rather than cast this card from your hand, pay {1}{G}{G} and exile it with three time counters on it. At the beginning of your upkeep, remove a time counter. When the last is removed, you may cast it without paying its mana cost.) Whenever a time counter is removed from Emanation of Evolution while it's exiled, you may sacrifice a creature. If you do, search your library for a creature card with mana value less than or equal to 1 plus the sacrificed creature's mana value, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.name: Recollection of Abundance
card.text: Tiered (Choose one additional cost.) + {G} — Target creature gets +3/+3 until end of turn. + {1}{G} — Search your library for a basic land card, put that card onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. + {3}{G}{G} — Create a 1/1 green Snake creature token, a 2/2 green Wolf creature token, and a 3/3 green Elephant creature token.

card.name: Corelia, Trinket Sleuth
card.text: Whenever you cast a spell with mana value 5 or greater from your hand, you may exile target card from a graveyard. You may play that card for as long as it remains exiled, and you may spend mana as though it were mana of any type to cast that spell.

card.name: Dolla, Reflective Overseer
card.text: Whenever you cast an enchantment spell, if this is the first time this ability has resolved this turn, create a white Reflection enchantment creature token with "This token's power and toughness are each equal to the number of enchantments you control." Otherwise, draw a card.

card.name: Silvertail, Veteran Oakguard
card.text: Vigilance Each other Squirrel you control enters with an additional +1/+1 counter on it. Whenever Silvertail deals combat damage to a player, muse 3. (Choose up to three counters on different other permanents you control and/or cards you own in exile. For each of them, remove it or add another.)

card.name: Sphinx of the Unending
card.text: Flash Flying Whenever Sphinx of the Unending deals combat damage to a player, each player discards their hand, then draws cards equal to the greatest power among creatures they control.

card.name: Turroy, the Companioneer
card.text: Flying Whenever a creature that doesn't share a creature type with a creature on the battlefield enters, put a +1/+1 counter on it and its controller draws a card. Whenever Turroy attacks, up to one target creature you don't control gains flying and hexproof until your next turn.

card.name: Tulvish, Idol of Abundance
card.text: Haste When Tulvish, Idol of Abundance enters, choose up to X. (Choose each mode only once.) • Put a +1/+1 counter on Tulvish. • Put a vigilance counter on Tulvish. • Put a trample counter on Tulvish. • Put a shield counter on Tulvish. (If it would be dealt damage or destroyed, remove a shield counter from it instead.)

card.name: Peacebringer
card.text: Vigilance If a creature card would be put into exile from anywhere, its owner puts it on the bottom of their library instead.

card.name: Endless Horizons
card.text: When Endless Horizons enters, search your library for any number of Plains cards, exile them, then shuffle. At the beginning of your upkeep, you may put a card you own exiled with Endless Horizons into your hand.

card.name: Ephemeral Elk
card.text: Whenever Ephemeral Elk attacks, exile it at end of combat with a time counter on it. Suspend 2—{W}{W} (Rather than cast this card from your hand, you may pay {W}{W} and exile it with two time counters on it. At the beginning of your upkeep, remove a time counter. When the last is removed, you may cast it without paying its mana cost. It has haste.)

card.name: Dream Killer
card.text: Menace Unnerve — Whenever one or more cards you own are exiled, put a +1/+1 counter on Dream Killer.

card.name: Drown in Agony
card.text: Remove all counters from permanents. Exile all creatures.

card.name: Culmination of Ambition
card.text: Menace Culmination of Ambition gets +1/+1 for each Swamp you control. At the beginning of your upkeep, up to one other target creature gets -X/-X until end of turn, where X is Culmination of Ambition's power.

card.name: Culmination of Abundance
card.text: Trample Culmination of Abundance gets +1/+1 for each Forest you control. At the beginning of your upkeep, you gain X life, where X is Culmination of Abundance's power.

card.name: Culmination of Aptitude
card.text: Flying Culmination of Aptitude gets +1/+1 for each Island you control. At the beginning of your upkeep, scry X, then draw a card, where X is Culmination of Aptitude's power.

card.name: Culmination of Passion
card.text: First strike Culmination of Passion gets +1/+1 for each Mountain you control. At the beginning of combat on your turn, gain control of up to one target creature you don't control with power X or less until end of turn, where X is Culmination of Passion's power. Untap it. It gains haste until end of turn.

card.name: Culmination of Virtue
card.text: Vigilance Culmination of Virtue gets +1/+1 for each Plains you control. At the beginning of combat on your turn, up to one other target creature gets +X/+X until end of turn, where X is Culmination of Virtue's power.

card.name: Homage to Antiquity
card.text: Homage to Antiquity enters tapped. {T}: Add {U}. {1}{U}, {T}, Exile Homage to Antiquity: Draw a card.

card.name: Shaping the Dawn Gates
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after IV.) Choose one that hasn't been chosen— • Create two 1/1 white Bird creature tokens with flying. • Return target nonland permanent card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield. • Creature spells you cast cost {1} less to cast this turn. Put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control. Those creatures gain vigilance until end of turn. ​

card.name: Deciphering the Great Truth
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after IV.) Choose one that hasn't been chosen— • Exile an instant or sorcery card from your graveyard. Copy it. You may cast the copy. • Draw up to two cards, then exile that many cards from your hand. • Exile up to three cards from your graveyard. When you do, tap target creature and put that many stun counters on it. If you own ten or more cards in exile, exile Deciphering the Great Truth and take an extra turn after this one. ​

card.name: Crossing the Rubicon
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after IV.) Choose one that hasn't been chosen — • Draw three cards. • Exile up to one target creature and all creature tokens you don't control. • Put a creature card you own from your graveyard or from exile onto the battlefield under your control. Exile Crossing the Rubicon, your hand, your graveyard, and your library. ​

card.name: Igniting the Aster
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after IV.) Choose one that hasn't been chosen — • Untap target creature and gain control of it for as long as you control Igniting the Aster. It gains haste. • Create a token that's a copy of target creature, except it has haste. Exile it when Igniting the Aster leaves the battlefield. • Exile the top three cards of your library. As long as you control a permanent named Igniting the Aster, you may play those cards. Add {R}{R}{R}. ​

card.name: Seeking the Sacred Glade
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after IV.) Choose one that hasn't been chosen — • Create a 1/1 green Saproling creature token. Put a +1/+1 counter on it. • Put two +1/+1 counters on target creature you control. • This turn, each creature you control enters with an additional +1/+1 counter on it. For each other permanent you control, you may double the number of each kind of counter on it. ​

card.name: Succumb to Oblivion
card.text: Until end of turn, you may cast spells from your hand by exiling a number of cards from the top of your library equal to their mana value rather than paying their mana costs.

card.name: Ralvus, Wild Vengeance
card.text: Vigilance, reach Whenever one or more Treefolk you control deals combat damage to a player, put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control. {B}, {T}, Sacrifice a creature with toughness 4 or greater: Destroy target creature.

card.name: Lilia, Muse of Virtue
card.text: Whenever you cast another white spell, create an 1/1 green Insect creature token, then put a +1/+1 counter on that token for each time this ability has resolved this turn beyond the first.

card.name: Vencent, Muse of Aptitude
card.text: Whenever you cast another blue spell, scry 1. If it is the second blue spell you've cast this turn, draw a card. If it is the third blue spell you've cast this turn, copy it. You may choose new targets for the copy. (A copy of a permanent spell becomes a token.)

card.name: Sachah, Muse of Ambition
card.text: Whenever you cast another black spell, return target non-Incarnation creature card with mana value less than or equal to that spell's mana value from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Triscan, Muse of Passion
card.text: Whenever you cast another red spell, exile the top card of your library. Until end of turn, you may play that card.

card.name: Ringword, Muse of Abundance
card.text: Whenever you cast another green spell, double Ringword, Muse of Abundance's power and toughness until end of turn.

card.name: Birthpoint, the Sacred Glade
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}: Choose a color. If there are four or more mana symbols of that color among permanents you control, add two mana of that color.

card.name: Emanation of Replication
card.text: Suspend 2—{2}{U}{U} (Rather than cast this card from your hand, pay {2}{U}{U} and exile it with two time counters on it. At the beginning of your upkeep, remove a time counter. When the last is removed, you may cast it without paying its mana cost.) Whenever a time counter is removed from Emanation of Reflections while it's exiled, copy the next noncreature spell you cast from your hand this turn when you cast it. You may choose new targets for the copy. (A copy of a permanent spell becomes a token.)

card.name: Patron of Rebirth
card.text: When Patron of Rebirth enters, return target creature card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield. Regrow 3 (When this creature dies, exile it with three time counters on it. It gains suspend. Creatures cast from suspend have haste.)

card.name: Recurring Reflection
card.text: You may have Recurring Reflection enter as a copy of another creature on the battlefield, except it's a Reflection enchantment in addition to its other typed and it has Recurring Reflection's other abilities. Regrow 4 (When this creature dies, exile it with four time counters on it. It gains suspend. Creatures cast from suspend have haste.)

card.name: Cyclical Manifestation
card.text: Regrow 3 (When this creature dies, exile it with three time counters on it. It gains suspend. Creatures cast from suspend have haste.) Whenever a time counter is removed from Cyclical Manifestation while it's exiled, each opponent loses 1 life. You gain life equal to the life lost this way.

card.name: Rekindling Fury
card.text: Haste When Rekindling Fury dies, exile the top card of your library. You may play that card until your next end step. Regrow 2 (When this creature dies, exile it with two time counters on it. It gains suspend.)

card.name: Resillient Might
card.text: Resillient Might enters with a +1/+1 counter on it. When Resillient Might enters, double the number of +1/+1 counters on it once for each time a creature named Resillient Might has entered under your control this game beyond the first. Regrow 3 (When this creature dies, exile it with three time counters on it. It gains suspend. Creatures cast from suspend have haste.)
